category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Philippines market.

title.en: China-to-Philippines LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具出口菲律宾：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具出口菲律賓：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Philippine market-access requirements: the BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) and PS mark under the lighting technical regulation, PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 standards, DOE energy labelling and MEPS, NTC type approval for smart lighting, and restricted-substance / e-waste obligations — versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification. Note the Philippine grid is 230 V 60 Hz, differing from China 220/380 V 50 Hz.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与菲律宾市场准入要求差距对照：依据照明技术法规的 BPS 进口商品清关（ICC）及 PS 标志、PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 标准、DOE 能效标签及 MEPS、智能照明的 NTC 型号核准，以及限用物质 / 电子废物义务——与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。注意菲律宾电网为 230 V 60 Hz，与中国 220/380 V 50 Hz 不同。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與菲律賓市場准入要求差距對照：依據照明技術法規的 BPS 進口商品清關（ICC）及 PS 標誌、PNS IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 標準、DOE 能效標籤及 MEPS、智能照明的 NTC 型號核准，以及限用物質 / 電子廢物義務——與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。注意菲律賓電網為 230 V 60 Hz，與中國 220/380 V 50 Hz 不同。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity-assessment-body assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Philippine technical regulations, PNS standards, BPS ICC / PS licensing scope, DOE energy labelling and MEPS thresholds, NTC type-approval requirements, and restricted-substance / e-waste obligations with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行菲律宾技术法规、PNS 标准、BPS ICC / PS 许可范围、DOE 能效标签及 MEPS 阈值、NTC 型号核准要求及限用物质 / 电子废物义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行菲律賓技術法規、PNS 標準、BPS ICC / PS 許可範圍、DOE 能效標籤及 MEPS 閾值、NTC 型號核准要求及限用物質 / 電子廢物義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to the Philippines must obtain a BPS Import Commodity Clearance (ICC) — or a PS Quality Certification Mark for local manufacture — for products covered by the lighting technical regulation, with safety demonstrated to the relevant PNS IEC standards (PNS IEC 60598 for luminaires, PNS IEC 62560 for self-ballasted LED lamps, PNS IEC 62471 for photobiological safety); secure DOE energy labelling and meet any applicable MEPS for the product class; obtain NTC type approval for any smart luminaire with radio functions (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth); design to the 230 V 60 Hz Philippine grid rather than China 220/380 V 50 Hz; appoint an in-country importer of record; and address restricted-substance and e-waste obligations even though the Philippines has no single horizontal RoHS-style directive — none of which is covered by existing China CCC certification or GB compliance.
answer_first.zh: 出口菲律宾的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：为照明技术法规涵盖的产品取得 BPS 进口商品清关（ICC）——本地生产则取得 PS 质量认证标志，并依据相关 PNS IEC 标准证明安全性（灯具适用 PNS IEC 60598、自镇流 LED 灯适用 PNS IEC 62560、光生物安全适用 PNS IEC 62471）；取得 DOE 能效标签并满足适用于该产品类别的 MEPS；为含无线功能（Wi-Fi / 蓝牙）的智能灯具取得 NTC 型号核准；按菲律宾 230 V 60 Hz 电网而非中国 220/380 V 50 Hz 进行设计；指定本地进口记录人；并处理限用物质及电子废物义务（即便菲律宾没有单一横向的 RoHS 式指令）——上述均不被现有中国 CCC 认证或 GB 合规所涵盖。
answer_first.zht: 出口菲律賓的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：為照明技術法規涵蓋的產品取得 BPS 進口商品清關（ICC）——本地生產則取得 PS 質量認證標誌，並依據相關 PNS IEC 標準證明安全性（燈具適用 PNS IEC 60598、自鎮流 LED 燈適用 PNS IEC 62560、光生物安全適用 PNS IEC 62471）；取得 DOE 能效標籤並滿足適用於該產品類別的 MEPS；為含無線功能（Wi-Fi / 藍牙）的智能燈具取得 NTC 型號核准；按菲律賓 230 V 60 Hz 電網而非中國 220/380 V 50 Hz 進行設計；指定本地進口記錄人；並處理限用物質及電子廢物義務（即便菲律賓沒有單一橫向的 RoHS 式指令）——上述均不被現有中國 CCC 認證或 GB 合規所涵蓋。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, or upon any change to the Philippine lighting technical regulation, PNS IEC standard editions, DOE energy labelling / MEPS thresholds, or NTC type-approval rules.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set true. BPS ICC / PS licensing scope, DOE MEPS thresholds, and applicable PNS IEC editions must be re-verified against current BPS, DOE, and NTC issuances on each review cycle.
